# ai-agents

> AI agent fleet — devops, finance, media, office, social. Shared Anthropic Claude API loop, domain-specific tools.

Monorepo containing five specialized AI agents built on a shared Anthropic Claude API architecture. Each agent has domain-specific tools while sharing common infrastructure for configuration, API interaction, and orchestration.

## Agents
- **DevOps Agent** — CI/CD automation, infrastructure management, MCP tools
- **Finance Agent** — Financial analysis, market data, portfolio analysis
- **Media Agent** — Content automation, media processing pipeline
- **Office Agent** — Document automation, workflow automation, productivity
- **Social Agent** — Social media automation, content scheduling, cross-platform publishing

## Architecture
- Shared core: agent loop, config management, Anthropic API client
- Domain-specific: each agent has its own tools, prompts, and workflows
- Python monorepo with shared src/shared/ and src/agents/ structure

## Links
- Repository: https://github.com/MackDing/ai-agents
- OPC Ecosystem: https://opc.ren
- Author: Mack Ding (@HiClaws)
